results.notes: self-provisions its own CompatLambdaStack (compat-lambda-doubler) via verify-or-provision; decoupled from the demo stack (#147)
self-provisions its own CompatS3Stack (compat-s3-bucket + a dedicated access-log bucket) via verify-or-provision; decoupled from the demo stack (#139)

self-provisions its own CompatDynamoStack (compat-dynamo-table; hardened with PITR + customer-managed KMS encryption) via verify-or-provision with a DescribeTable provenance-marker read-back; decoupled from the demo stack (#140)
